## Tracks provided or generated by PomBase

### TF binding motifs

The binding motifs (as positional frequency matrices) from
[Skribbe *et al.*](/reference/PMID:40015273) were mapped using the
[PWMScan tool](https://epd.expasy.org/) with the pseudo-count fraction
set as 0.00001.

The cut-off for motif detection was set as p-value=0.0001 or lower.
